---
title: "Data Analytics with Excel"
format: gfm
---

Essentials for visualizing and modeling data to inform business decision-making using Excel, with a case competition example.

## Project Organization

- `/data` Simulated and real data, the latter not pushed.
- `/figures` PNG images and plots.
- `/presentations` Presentation slides.
- `/private` A catch-all folder for miscellaneous files, not pushed.
- `.gitignore` Hidden Git instructions file.
- `LICENSE` MIT License for "as is" permission.
- `README.md` GitHub-flavored markdown README rendered from `README.qmd`.
- `README.qmd` Quarto markdown README to edit and render into `README.md`.

## Project Environment

For more details on using Python, Positron, GitHub, Quarto, etc. see the recommended [data stack](https://github.com/marcdotson/data-stack).
